animals.title: 🐾 Amazing Animals
animals.html:
There are many kinds of animals in the world. Some animals are mammals. Mammals have fur or hair on their skin. Dogs, cats and elephants are mammals.

Some animals are birds. Birds have feathers and wings. Most birds can fly, but penguins cannot fly. They use their wings to swim!

Some animals are fish. Fish live in water. They have scales on their skin and gills to breathe underwater.

Some animals are amphibians. Frogs and toads are amphibians. They can live in water and on land. Baby frogs live in water, but adult frogs can jump on land too!

Some animals lay eggs. Birds, fish, reptiles and amphibians all lay eggs. But most mammals do not lay eggs — they have live babies.

bodyparts.title: 🦁 Animal Body Parts
bodyparts.html:
Every animal has a body with different parts. Animals use their body parts to survive.

Animals have a head with eyes to see. They have ears to hear sounds around them. They have a mouth to eat food.

Most animals have legs to walk or run. Dogs have four legs. Birds have two legs. But snakes have no legs at all! They use their long body to move.

Some animals have special body parts. Eagles have feathers and strong wings to fly very fast. Rabbits are very gentle. They have long ears to hear danger. Elephants are very strong. They use their long trunk to drink water and pick up food.
